ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, content creator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "secret" TEXT /* Secret key for the integration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the integration is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the integration was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being logged */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_message" TEXT /* Message describing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, content creation, role change) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the system update */,
  "update_message" TEXT /* Message describing the system update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the system update was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_integration" (
  "user_integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-integration association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being associated with the integration */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration being associated with the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user-integration association is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_integration_integration_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_id") REFERENCES integrations ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_integration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit log */,
  "audit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the audit log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the audit log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being versioned */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., role, integration) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version entry was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES integrations ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "created_by" (
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each created_by entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being tracked */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., role, integration, user) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the entity was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("created_by_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_created_by_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES integrations ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_created_by_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_created_by_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
